final:
module RefModule(
    input d,
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        q <= 1'b0;
    end else begin
        q <= d;
    end
end

endmodule
